audit_items.proof_trace: The exhaustive if/else at L350-355 guarantees that when asset == s_assetOut the full balanceOf(this) is transferred to s_assetOutReceiver (L351) and the auction-start branch is never entered. s_auctionStarts[assetOut] is structurally never set (the only writer at L353 is in the else branch where asset != s_assetOut), so assetOut cannot appear legitimately in endedAuctions either. _onAuctionEnd independently sweeps all assetOut balance to assetOutReceiver as a secondary guarantee.
